delivery_mode_reason: Devpost requires a public demo video URL and does not expose a separate required deck field; the pitch and demo will be combined into one under-3-minute video.

frontend.dependency_policy: frontend deps install with @latest/unversioned targets unless an override_reason is recorded
frontend.non_tailwind_visual_signature: radial containment countdown, evidence ticker, dossier seal, and proof timeline rail
frontend.hero_composition: mission-control cockpit with central countdown, left risk identity, right evidence stream, and bottom proof rail
frontend.visual_differentiation_note: Avoids generic purple AI gradients, shadcn admin cards, and static observability boards by staging a live security countdown.

qr_mobile_access.entry: QR code opens /dossier/demo read-only proof artifact
qr_mobile_access.mobile_primary_flow: inspect containment status, evidence chain, approval record, and verification result in <= 2 taps
qr_mobile_access.desktop_parity_plan: desktop remains the full mission-control cockpit for countdown, threshold, and approval interactions

asset_sources.logo: logo-generator skill output planned for G3

motion: framer-motion countdown and evidence-feed state transitions

ai.provider: OpenAI-compatible provider from local secret source for non-Splunk prototype narration and bounded structured output

models.splunk_hosted_model: Splunk AI Toolkit Hosted Models / Foundation AI Security Model narrative when credentials are provided

required_env.name: SPLUNK_HOST
required_env.required_for: live Splunk Enterprise/Cloud telemetry and verification queries

required_env.name: SPLUNK_INDEX
required_env.required_for: live query target; seeded fallback uses local replay data

required_env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
required_env.required_for: bounded structured-output fallback when Splunk Hosted Models are unavailable locally

real_data_sources.source: D1-backed project seed dataset shaped like Splunk security events
real_data_sources.evidence: replay scenario produces saved EvidenceRecord rows, KV replay state, and SPL-style query transcript

real_data_sources.source: Next.js route handler backed by D1/KV contracts that deterministically transitions identity ACTIVE -> CONTAINED
real_data_sources.evidence: ContainmentAction row, execution log, ownerId/sessionId, and verification report

real_data_sources.source: Cloudflare D1/R2 proof artifact storage with KV latest-dossier pointer

product_backbone.identity: guest demo session with operator/viewer roles
product_backbone.storage: Cloudflare D1 for events/actions/dossiers, KV for replay state, R2 for exports
product_backbone.multi_user_proof: desktop operator executes containment while mobile QR viewer observes generated dossier

user_case_beats.beat: Risk evidence accumulates and countdown advances
user_case_beats.state_change: risk score and countdown state update
proof artifact is saved and exportable

prd_coverage.minimum: every P0/P1 REQ-### row has route/API/real-data/test/deploy evidence before recording

notes: Production G5 deploy uses real Cloudflare D1/KV/R2 persistence and a real OpenAI-compatible reasoning API. Live Splunk credentials remain absent, so all UI, docs, video, and submission copy must say seeded Splunk-compatible telemetry unless SPLUNK_HOST/SPLUNK_TOKEN/SPLUNK_INDEX are later configured and smoke-tested.
